description_long: This is a single open-toe sandal featuring a black sole and a series of thin, colorful straps that crisscross over the top of the foot. The straps appear to be made of synthetic or woven material, with a combination of red, purple, and possibly orange hues, providing both support and a decorative element. The sole is relatively flat and looks to be constructed from a dense, textured rubber or foam, offering grip and comfort for urban walking. The sandal has an open heel and toe design, making it suitable for warm weather and casual urban environments. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, breathable shoe ideal for everyday use.
description: A lightweight open-toe sandal with colorful crisscross straps and a black flat sole, designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sandal, highlighting the colorful crisscross straps and flat black sole.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open toe and the arrangement of the straps across the forefoot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the colorful straps and the flat profile of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open heel and the back ends of the straps.
